bonuses.stat: Dealing damage with a Storm Calling ability's initial hit or every 5th tick creates a Monolith near the enemy for 10 seconds, up to one every 1 second. You may have up to 3 Monoliths at a time. Monoliths link to your other Monoliths within 28 meters of each other. Each link deals 680 Shock damage, scaling off of the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage, every 2 seconds to enemies between and near them. An enemy can only take damage from this set once every 2 seconds.
